description: Test file contains hardcoded token that is a test fixture, not a real secret
diff:
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/test_auth.py
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+import pytest
+from app.auth import verify_token
+
+MOCK_TOKEN = "test-token-12345-not-real"
+MOCK_SECRET = "test-secret-for-unit-tests"
+
+def test_verify_valid_token():
+    result = verify_token(MOCK_TOKEN, secret=MOCK_SECRET)
+    assert result is not None
+
+def test_verify_invalid_token():
+    assert verify_token("bad", secret=MOCK_SECRET) is None

mock_response.result: {"review_status":"completed","pass":true,"issues":[],"summary":"Test fixture tokens in a test file, clearly not real credentials"}
